---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, unclear, or outdated documentation
title: "[DOCS] Brief description of documentation issue"
labels: documentation
assignees: []

---

## Description

**What's the issue with the documentation?**

- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Unclear or confusing explanation
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Incorrect example or code
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Location

**Where is this issue?**

- Documentation page: [e.g., `docs/guide/getting-started.md`]
- Section: [e.g., "Installation" or "Configuration"]
- Line/paragraph: [If known]
- URL: [Link to documentation page]

## Current Content

**What does the documentation currently say?**

```
Current text/code example
```

## Expected Content

**What should the documentation say?**

```
Corrected/improved text/code example
```

## Impact

**How does this documentation issue affect users?**

- [ ] Prevents me from using md-evals
- [ ] Confuses about best practices
- [ ] Wastes time troubleshooting
- [ ] Creates incorrect mental model
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Suggested Improvement

**Do you have a suggestion for how to fix this?**

Provide specific wording, examples, or structural changes that would improve the documentation.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the affected documentation section
- [ ] I've checked if this is addressed elsewhere in docs
- [ ] I've provided the location and issue clearly
- [ ] I've suggested an improvement
